name: A Working Woman's Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground round in a little olive oil until browned. Drain and set aside.
2. In the same pan, sauté diced green peppers, celery, onion, and garlic until tender.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (except water) to the pan and mix well.
4. Simmer for approximately 15 minutes.
5. Add water to achieve desired consistency and continue simmering another 15 minutes.
(Note: Oregano vinegar is made by steeping fresh oregano in white vinegar for at least 10 days, or longer.)
(Note: Chili pepper can be prepared from a canned chipotle in adobo sauce mixed with 1 tablespoon of the sauce.)
